description_en: Auckland may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 144 halal restaurants and 17 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Auckland, New Zealand, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Auckland: 144+ halal restaurants, 17 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.5/5.
